name: No Roll Apple Pie
recipeIngredient: 6 cups Apples; thinly sliced and peeled
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: South Bend Tribune
CRUST: Combine dry ingredients in a 9-inch pie pan. Mix milk with oil. Pour over the dry ingredients and combine using a fork. Form a pie shell by bringing the crust up along the sides of the pan.
APPLE FILLING: In a separate bowl, mix together 1/2 cup sugar and 2 tablespoons flour. Set aside. Sprinkle apple slices with lemon juice and toss with the sugar mixture. Pour into the prepared pie crust. Mix remaining ingredients (sugar, flour, cinnamon, and ginger) in another bowl until crumbly. Sprinkle on top of the apples. Bake at 375°F for one hour.
